# Support

Orkyo Community Edition is **community-supported on a best-effort basis** — there is no SLA or guaranteed
response time. Please use the right channel so things stay findable:

| I want to… | Use |
|---|---|
| Report a reproducible **bug** | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-community/issues/new/choose) |
| Ask a **question**, get **setup help**, or share an idea | [Start a discussion](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-community/discussions) |
| Report a **security vulnerability** | See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) — **do not** open a public issue |
| Get **managed hosting, updates, backups, and paid support** | [Orkyo Cloud](https://orkyo.com) |

Before opening an issue, please check [existing issues](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-community/issues)
and [discussions](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-community/discussions) — your question may already be
answered. For setup problems, include your Docker/Compose versions, the relevant `docker compose logs`
output, and what you expected to happen.
